scripts.db:up: sh -lc 'if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose up -d mongo clickhouse; else docker compose up -d mongo clickhouse; fi'
scripts.db:down: sh -lc 'if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose down; else docker compose down; fi'
scripts.db:logs: sh -lc 'if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose logs -f mongo clickhouse; else docker compose logs -f mongo clickhouse; fi'
scripts.db:ps: sh -lc 'if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose ps; else docker compose ps; fi'
